summary: Completed testing of OEC Tech Institute iteration 6 features: course pricing with admission fees, Enroll Now buttons, diploma track totals, Start This Track checkout links, and policy pages (Privacy, Terms, Refund). All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/courses returns 200 with all 8 courses
Backend: All courses have admission_fee field

Backend: Course prices match requirements (Computer Apps=6000+1000, Graphic=12000+1000, SMM=12000+1000, WordPress=12000+1000, Shopify=16000+2000, Amazon VA=20000+2000, eBay=20000+2000, YT TikTok=12000+1000)
Backend: GET /api/courses/{course_id} returns admission_fee
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks returns 200 with 3 tracks
Backend: Diploma tracks have courses array with valid course IDs
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks/{track_id} returns track details
Frontend: Courses page shows 8 course cards
Frontend: Each course card has 'Enroll Now' button (data-testid='enroll-btn-{course_id}')
Frontend: Course cards show price with admission fee text (e.g., 'PKR 6,000' + '+ PKR 1,000 admission')
Frontend: Course detail page shows price with admission fee breakdown
Frontend: Course detail page has 'Enroll Now' button (data-testid='enroll-course-btn')
Frontend: Diploma Tracks page shows total investment price (data-testid='track-total-{track_id}')
Frontend: Digital Marketing Diploma total: PKR 26,000
Frontend: E-Commerce Diploma total: PKR 62,000
Frontend: Web Design Diploma total: PKR 33,000
Frontend: 'Start This Track' buttons link to /checkout/track/{track_id}
Frontend: Track checkout is protected route (redirects to login)
Frontend: Privacy Policy page loads at /privacy-policy (data-testid='privacy-policy-page')
Frontend: Terms of Service page loads at /terms-of-service (data-testid='terms-of-service-page')
Frontend: Refund Policy page loads at /refund-policy (data-testid='refund-policy-page')
Frontend: Refund Policy shows JazzCash account (983012259)
Frontend: Refund Policy shows EasyPaisa account (0300-1413747)
Frontend: Refund Policy shows Soneri Bank account (20016289664)
Frontend: Footer has Privacy Policy link (data-testid='footer-privacy-link')
Frontend: Footer has Terms of Service link (data-testid='footer-terms-link')
Frontend: Footer has Refund Policy link (data-testid='footer-refund-link')
test_credentials: No auth needed for public pages. Checkout pages require Google OAuth authentication.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified: 1) Course cards have Enroll Now buttons and show admission fees. 2) Course prices updated in MongoDB with admission_fee field. 3) Diploma tracks show total investment (course fees + admission fees combined). 4) Start This Track links to /checkout/track/{track_id} (protected route). 5) Three policy pages added: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Refund Policy with correct bank details. 6) Footer has links to all policy pages.
